backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined yet.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that ContactFooter.tsx was updated with placeholder-ready contact fields (address, phone, email) with realistic example values.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Luminary single-page app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page layout by rendering Navigation, HeroSection, AboutSection, FeaturesSection, and ContactFooter in sequence.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column about section with an animated orbital logo graphic and stat cards on the left, and descriptive copy with checkmark highlights on the right.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Combined contact section and footer with updated contact details (email, phone, address), a contact form with submission feedback, social links, footer navigation, and copyright.
Six-card responsive features grid showcasing capabilities like performance, security, and analytics, with amber icon badges and hover glow effects.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background image, gradient overlay, animated headline and subheading, dual CTA buttons, stat counters, and a scroll-down indicator.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, active section tracking via scroll position, and a responsive mobile menu toggle using Lucide icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a dark charcoal + warm amber OKLCH color palette via CSS variables, Tailwind base/utilities layers, and custom utility classes for glows, gradients, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (amber, charcoal), display fonts (Syne/Inter), amber glow box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks project version, implemented features (multi-section landing page, dark/amber theme, contact info update), and a pending action request to update contact information on the website.
